sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import {
  Box,
  Button,
  Container,
  Typography,
  Grid,
  Card,
  CardContent,
  Stack,
  Paper,
  useTheme,
  Avatar,
  Chip,
  Fade,
  Divider,
  IconButton,
  useMediaQuery,
  TextField,
  CircularProgress
} from '@mui/material';
import AutoAwesomeIcon from '@mui/icons-material/AutoAwesome';
import ArrowForwardIcon from '@mui/icons-material/ArrowForward';
import StarIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Star';
import CheckCircleIcon from '@mui/icons-material/CheckCircle';
import PlayArrowIcon from '@mui/icons-material/PlayArrow';
import VerifiedUserIcon from '@mui/icons-material/VerifiedUser';
import FormatQuoteIcon from '@mui/icons-material/FormatQuote';

const HomePage = () => {
  const theme = useTheme();
  const isMobile = useMediaQuery(theme.breakpoints.down('md'));
  
  // Interactive demo state
  const [activeStep, setActiveStep] = useState(0);
  
  // Auto-advance demo steps
  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
      setActiveStep(1);
      const timer2 = setTimeout(() => {
        setActiveStep(2);
        const timer3 = setTimeout(() => {
          setActiveStep(0);
        }, 4000);
        return () => clearTimeout(timer3);
      }, 4000);
      return () => clearTimeout(timer2);
    }, 4000);
    
    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [activeStep === 0]);

  return (
    <Box sx={{ overflow: 'hidden' }}>
      {/* Hero Section */}
      <Box 
        sx={{
          pt: { xs: 8, md: 10 },
          pb: { xs: 10, md: 12 },
          position: 'relative',
          minHeight: '80vh',
          display: 'flex',
          alignItems: 'center'
        }}
      >
        {/* Background gradient */}
        <Box 
          sx={{
            position: 'absolute',
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            right: 0,
            bottom: 0,
            background: 'linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(93, 95, 239, 0.05) 0%, rgba(93, 95, 239, 0) 100%)',
            zIndex: -1
          }}
        />
        
        <Container maxWidth="lg" sx={{ position: 'relative' }}>
          <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: { xs: 'column', md: 'row' }, alignItems: 'center' }}>
            {/* Left side - Hero text */}
            <Box sx={{ width: { xs: '100%', md: '50%' }, pr: { md: 6 }, mb: { xs: 6, md: 0 } }}>
              <Chip
                icon={<AutoAwesomeIcon />}
                label="AI-Powered Testimonials"
                sx={{ 
                  mb: 3, 
                  bgcolor: 'primary.light', 
                  color: 'primary.dark',
                  fontWeight: 600,
                  '& .MuiChip-icon': { color: 'primary.main' }
                }}
              />
              
              <Typography 
                variant="h2" 
                component="h1" 
                gutterBottom
                sx={{ 
                  fontWeight: 700,
                  fontSize: { xs: '2.5rem', md: '3.5rem' },
                  lineHeight: 1.2
                }}
              >
                Turn <Box component="span" sx={{ color: 'primary.main' }}>"It was good"</Box> into testimonials that sell
              </Typography>
              
              <Typography variant="subtitle1" color="text.secondary" sx={{ mb: 4, fontSize: '1.1rem' }}>
                Enhance bland client feedback into compelling stories that showcase your true impact—with AI that captures transformation, emotion, and results.
              </Typography>
              
              <Stack direction={{ xs: 'column', sm: 'row' }} spacing={2}>
                <Button 
                  variant="contained" 
                  color="primary"
                  size="large"
                  component={RouterLink}
                  to="/enhance"
                  sx={{ px: 3, py: 1.5 }}
                  endIcon={<ArrowForwardIcon />}
                >
                  Enhance a Testimonial
                </Button>
                
                <Button 
                  variant="outlined" 
                  color="primary"
                  size="large"
                  startIcon={<PlayArrowIcon />}
                  sx={{ px: 3, py: 1.5 }}
                  onClick={() => setActiveStep(0)}
                >
                  See How It Works
                </Button>
              </Stack>
              
              <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', mt: 4 }}>
                <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', mr: 1.5 }}>
                  {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
                    <StarIcon key={i} sx={{ color: '#FFD700', fontSize: 20 }} />
                  ))}
                </Box>
                <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary">
                  <Box component="span" sx={{ fontWeight: 600, color: 'text.primary' }}>4.9/5</Box> from 200+ users
                </Typography>
              </Box>
            </Box>
            
            {/* Right side - Interactive Demo */}
            <Box 
              sx={{ 
                width: { xs: '100%', md: '50%' },
                height: { xs: 'auto', md: '500px' },
                position: 'relative',
                display: 'flex',
                justifyContent: 'center',
                alignItems: 'center'
              }}
            >
              <Box sx={{ position: 'relative', width: '100%', maxWidth: 400 }}>
                {/* Original Testimonial Card */}
                <Fade in={true}>
                  <Card
                    elevation={3}
                    sx={{
                      position: 'absolute',
                      top: 0,
                      left: 0,
                      width: '70%',
                      borderRadius: 4,
                      bgcolor: 'white',
                      zIndex: 1,
                      transform: activeStep >= 1 ? 'translateY(-10px)' : 'translateY(0)',
                      transition: 'transform 0.5s ease',
                      overflow: 'visible'
                    }}
                  >
                    <CardContent sx={{ p: 3 }}>
                      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', mb: 1 }}>
                        <FormatQuoteIcon sx={{ color: 'text.disabled', mr: 1, transform: 'scale(1.5)' }} />
                        <Typography variant="overline" color="text.secondary" fontWeight={600}>
                          ORIGINAL TESTIMONIAL
                        </Typography>
                      </Box>
                      <Typography variant="body1" sx={{ fontStyle: 'italic', mb: 2 }}>
                        "The coaching was good. I learned some things that helped me."
                      </Typography>
                    </CardContent>
                  </Card>
                </Fade>
                
                {/* Connecting Line 1 */}
                {activeStep >= 1 && (
                  <Box
                    sx={{
                      position: 'absolute',
                      top: '30%',
                      left: '35%',
                      height: '80px',
                      width: '2px',
                      bgcolor: 'primary.main',
                      zIndex: 0
                    }}
                  />
                )}
                
                {/* Enhanced Testimonial Card */}
                <Fade in={activeStep >= 1} timeout={500}>
                  <Card
                    elevation={3}
                    sx={{
                      position: 'absolute',
                      top: '100px',
                      left: '30%',
                      width: '70%',
                      borderRadius: 4,
                      bgcolor: 'primary.main',
                      color: 'white',
                      zIndex: 2,
                      transform: activeStep >= 2 ? 'translateY(-10px)' : 'translateY(0)',
                      transition: 'transform 0.5s ease',
                      overflow: 'visible'
                    }}
                  >
                    <CardContent sx={{ p: 3 }}>
                      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', mb: 1 }}>
                        <AutoAwesomeIcon sx={{ color: 'white', mr: 1 }} />
                        <Typography variant="overline" color="white" fontWeight={600}>
                          AI-ENHANCED
                        </Typography>
                      </Box>
                      <Typography variant="body1" sx={{ fontStyle: 'italic', mb: 2 }}>
                        "Working with Sarah transformed my approach to challenges. I went from feeling stuck to landing two major clients in just 3 weeks."
                      </Typography>
                    </CardContent>
                  </Card>
                </Fade>
                
                {/* Connecting Line 2 */}
                {activeStep >= 2 && (
                  <Box
                    sx={{
                      position: 'absolute',
                      top: '230px',
                      left: '65%',
                      height: '80px',
                      width: '2px',
                      bgcolor: '#4CAF50',
                      zIndex: 0
                    }}
                  />
                )}
                
                {/* Client Approval Card */}
                <Fade in={activeStep >= 2} timeout={500}>
                  <Card
                    elevation={3}
                    sx={{
                      position: 'absolute',
                      top: '300px',
                      left: '50%',
                      width: '70%',
                      borderRadius: 4,
                      bgcolor: '#E8F5E9',
                      color: '#2E7D32',
                      zIndex: 3,
                      overflow: 'visible'
                    }}
                  >
                    <CardContent sx={{ p: 3 }}>
                      <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', mb: 1 }}>
                        <CheckCircleIcon sx={{ color: '#2E7D32', mr: 1 }} />
                        <Typography variant="overline" color="#2E7D32" fontWeight={600}>
                          CLIENT VERIFIED
                        </Typography>
                      </Box>
                      <Typography variant="body1" sx={{ color: 'text.primary', mb: 2 }}>
                        Testimonial approved by client and ready to use
                      </Typography>
                    </CardContent>
                  </Card>
                </Fade>
              </Box>
            </Box>
          </Box>
        </Container>
      </Box>

      {/* How It Works Section */}
      <Box sx={{ py: 10, bgcolor: 'background.default' }}>
        <Container maxWidth="lg">
          <Typography 
            variant="h3" 
            align="center" 
            gutterBottom
            sx={{ fontWeight: 700 }}
          >
            How It Works
          </Typography>
          
          <Typography 
            variant="subtitle1" 
            align="center" 
            color="text.secondary" 
            sx={{ mb: 8, maxWidth: 700, mx: 'auto' }}
          >
            Transform bland testimonials into powerful stories in three simple steps
          </Typography>
          
          <Grid container spacing={4}>
            <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={4}>
              <Card 
                elevation={0} 
                sx={{ 
                  height: '100%',
                  p: 3,
                  borderRadius: 3,
                  border: '1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)',
                  transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
                  '&:hover': {
                    transform: 'translateY(-5px)',
                    boxShadow: '0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)'
                  }
                }}
              >
                <Box 
                  sx={{ 
                    width: 50, 
                    height: 50, 
                    borderRadius: '50%', 
                    bgcolor: 'primary.light',
                    color: 'primary.main',
                    display: 'flex',
                    alignItems: 'center',
                    justifyContent: 'center',
                    fontWeight: 700,
                    fontSize: '1.5rem',
                    mb: 2
                  }}
                >
                  1
                </Box>
                <Typography variant="h5" gutterBottom>
                  Submit raw testimonial
                </Typography>
                <Typography variant="body1" color="text.secondary">
                  Paste your client's original words, no matter how brief or bland they might be.
                </Typography>
              </Card>
            </Grid>
            
            <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={4}>
              <Card 
                elevation={0} 
                sx={{ 
                  height: '100%',
                  p: 3,
                  borderRadius: 3,
                  border: '1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)',
                  transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
                  '&:hover': {
                    transform: 'translateY(-5px)',
                    boxShadow: '0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)'
                  }
                }}
              >
                <Box 
                  sx={{ 
                    width: 50, 
                    height: 50, 
                    borderRadius: '50%', 
                    bgcolor: 'primary.light',
                    color: 'primary.main',
                    display: 'flex',
                    alignItems: 'center',
                    justifyContent: 'center',
                    fontWeight: 700,
                    fontSize: '1.5rem',
                    mb: 2
                  }}
                >
                  2
                </Box>
                <Typography variant="h5" gutterBottom>
                  Get AI-enhanced version
                </Typography>
                <Typography variant="body1" color="text.secondary">
                  Our AI extracts the transformation, emotion, and impact from your client's experience.
                </Typography>
              </Card>
            </Grid>
            
            <Grid item xs={12} sm={6} md={4}>
              <Card 
                elevation={0} 
                sx={{ 
                  height: '100%',
                  p: 3,
                  borderRadius: 3,
                  border: '1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)',
                  transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
                  '&:hover': {
                    transform: 'translateY(-5px)',
                    boxShadow: '0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)'
                  }
                }}
              >
                <Box 
                  sx={{ 
                    width: 50, 
                    height: 50, 
                    borderRadius: '50%', 
                    bgcolor: 'primary.light',
                    color: 'primary.main',
                    display: 'flex',
                    alignItems: 'center',
                    justifyContent: 'center',
                    fontWeight: 700,
                    fontSize: '1.5rem',
                    mb: 2
                  }}
                >
                  3
                </Box>
                <Typography variant="h5" gutterBottom>
                  One-click client approval
                </Typography>
                <Typography variant="body1" color="text.secondary">
                  Send a verification link to your client for instant approval with a single click.
                </Typography>
              </Card>
            </Grid>
          </Grid>
        </Container>
      </Box>

      {/* CTA Section */}
      <Box sx={{ py: 10 }}>
        <Container maxWidth="md">
          <Card 
            sx={{ 
              p: { xs: 4, md: 6 },
              background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #5D5FEF 0%, #7879F1 100%)',
              color: 'white',
              textAlign: 'center',
              position: 'relative',
              overflow: 'hidden',
              borderRadius: 4
            }}
          >
            <Box 
              sx={{
                position: 'absolute',
                top: 0,
                left: 0,
                right: 0,
                bottom: 0,
                opacity: 0.1,
                backgroundImage: 'radial-gradient(circle, #ffffff 1px, transparent 1px)',
                backgroundSize: '20px 20px'
              }}
            />
            
            <Typography variant="h3" gutterBottom>
              Ready to transform your testimonials?
            </Typography>
            <Typography variant="subtitle1" sx={{ mb: 4, opacity: 0.9, maxWidth: 600, mx: 'auto' }}>
              Start free, no credit card required. Upgrade when you need more.
            </Typography>
            <Button 
              variant="contained" 
              size="large"
              component={RouterLink}
              to="/enhance"
              sx={{ 
                px: 4, 
                py: 1.5,
                bgcolor: 'white',
                color: 'primary.main',
                '&:hover': {
                  bgcolor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)'
                }
              }}
            >
              Get Started Now
            </Button>
          </Card>
        </Container>
      </Box>
    </Box>
  );
};

export default HomePage;
